identity.name: MARCEL
identity.aesthetic: Swiss International Style meets Enterprise functionality. Rigid grids, high contrast, information density, and absolute typographical hierarchy.

project_detail.structure: Fixed sidebar, scrollable content area. Header contains breadcrumbs and primary actions.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F172A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E293B] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F172A] border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.metric: flex flex-col justify-between p-6 bg-white border-l-4 border-l-[#0F172A] border-y border-r border-gray-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm

tables.header: bg-gray-50 text-left font-semibold text-gray-900 border-b border-gray-200
tables.status_badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium capitalize

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

libraries.name: lucide-react
libraries.usage: For all icons. Use strict 1.5px stroke width for consistency.

libraries.name: recharts
libraries.usage: For data visualization (budget trends, status distribution).

accessibility.contrast: Strict WCAG AA compliance. Text on colored badges must check contrast.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Stick to flat, solid colors.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give a distinct 'MARCEL' look.
Data density is key. Avoid excessive padding in tables. Use 'p-3' or 'p-2' for table cells.
All financial figures must be right-aligned and monospaced (JetBrains Mono).
Dates should be formatted as 'DD MMM YYYY' (e.g., 12 Oct 2025).
Status badges (RAG) are the primary visual indicator in lists.
Sidebar should remain dark (#0F172A) to anchor the layout.
Use a 'breadcrumb' navigation on all detail pages.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install fonts via Google Fonts import in index.css. Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout: Create a persistent Layout component with the Sidebar and Topbar.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Use React Router. Protect routes based on roles.
instructions_to_main_agent.mocking: Mock all API calls with realistic French enterprise data (e.g., 'Projet Phoenix', 'Transformation Digitale 2025').
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts for the Dashboard. Keep them simple: Bar Charts and Pie Charts only.
